flavorPhrases: Prising apart a loose floor tile, you find {container} concealed in the hollow beneath.
Wedged behind a supporting pillar and half-buried in rubble -- {container}.
A section of wall gives under pressure. In the shallow recess behind it, someone left this.
Scratched into the floor is a crude arrow. Following it leads to a collapsed niche.
The cell has a false bottom. It comes away cleanly. Whoever hid this knew what they were doing.
The skeleton in the alcove had its arms folded over something. It takes a moment to see why.
